snippet: Where a commercial operator has been engaged there must be a written agreement setting out: Wherever possible, school council, as a legal entity, should enter into written agreements with third parties for the purpose of school fundraising activities, rather than individual members of the school community. If amusement rides, attractions and fireworks are planned as part of a school fete or other fundraising event, a separate written agreement is required – refer to: Amusement Rides, Attractions and Fireworks . Refer to: Contractors – Insurance and Contract Arrangements .
